center.name: Walter Koelz
center.summary: Walter Koelz是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括高山雨燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nubifugus described by Koelz (1854) distributed across the Himalayas and wintering in central India, (9) A

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: nubifugus described by Koelz (1854) distributed across the Himalayas and wintering in central India, (9) A
